name: calibrated-uncertainty
triggers: The user asks for likelihood or confidence: how confident, how likely, probability, odds, forecast, prediction, estimate, or whether something will work, scale, or hold
The draft attaches certainty words (definitely, certainly, guaranteed, 100%, can't fail) to claims
Load-bearing claims about unverified state carry no evidence-level distinction
counterindications: Every claim was observed or executed live this session; hedging them would miscalibrate downward
Pure preference or taste question; calibration has no object
